```{r Import libraries}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
source("../common/load-neoipcr.R")
load_neoipcr(dev_pkg_path = "../../../neoipcr")
library(tidyverse, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(smplot2, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(scales, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(patchwork, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(gt, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
```

```{r Set up functions}
#| include: false

source("../common/helpers.R")

labels_bw <- function(x) {
  paste(
    format_integer(x),
    sR$gramm_abbreviation,
    sep = sR$unit_separator)
}
breaks_bw <- function(x) {
  pretty(
    x,
    as.integer(
      (as.integer(x[2]) + 1 - as.integer(x[1])) / 100)
    )
}
labels_wk <- function(x) {
  paste(
    format(
      as.integer(x / 7),
      big.mark = sR$digit_group_separator
      ),
    sR$week_abbreviation,
    sep = sR$unit_separator)
}
breaks_wk <- function(x) {
  pretty(
    x / 7,
    as.integer((as.integer(x[2] / 7) + 1 - as.integer(x[1] / 7)) / 2)
    ) * 7
}

#' Detect if reference dataset contains countries from different World Bank classes
#' @param ref_countries Tibble with reference countries (name, wb_class)
#' @param include_wb_class Whether WB class is included ("no", "pseudonymised", "yes")
#' @return List with has_mixed (logical) and class_names (character) or NULL
detect_mixed_wb_classes <- function(ref_countries, include_wb_class) {
  # Only detect when include_wb_class = "yes"
  if (include_wb_class != "yes" ||
      is.null(ref_countries)) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  # For character vector, no WB class info available
  if (is.character(ref_countries) ||
      !("wb_class" %in% names(ref_countries))) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Get unique WB classes
  ref_classes <- ref_countries |>
    dplyr::pull("wb_class") |>
    as.character() |>
    unique() |>
    sort()

  # Check if more than one class
  has_mixed <- length(ref_classes) > 1

  if (!has_mixed) {
    return(list(has_mixed = FALSE))
  }

  # Get localized display names for all classes
  class_names <- get_localised_world_bank_class_names(ref_classes) |>
    paste(collapse = ", ")

  return(list(
    has_mixed = TRUE,
    class_names = class_names
  ))
}

```

```{r Initialise locale dependent information}
#| include: false

locale <- Sys.getenv("LC_ALL")
localeObj <- parse_locales(locale)[[1]]
invisible(Sys.setlocale(category = "LC_ALL", locale = locale))
invisible(Sys.setLanguage(localeObj$language))
if(is.null(localeObj$territory)){
  locale_gt <- localeObj$language
  locale_stringi <- localeObj$language
} else {
  locale_gt <- paste0(localeObj$language, "-", localeObj$territory)
  locale_stringi <- paste0(localeObj$language, "_", localeObj$territory)
}
options(`gt.locale` = locale_gt)

sR <- get_string_resources(localeObj)
```

```{r Importing data}
#| include: false

if(!exists("params")) params <- list()

if (!is.null(params$referenceDataFile)) {
  if (!file.exists(params$referenceDataFile))
    stop(sprintf("The file '%s' does not exist.", params$referenceDataFile))
  reference_data <- jsonlite::unserializeJSON(
    readChar(
        params$referenceDataFile,
        file.info(params$referenceDataFile)$size))
} else {
  reference_data <- suppressWarnings(import_dhis2(
    connection_options = get_connection_options(
      scheme = params$dhis2Scheme, hostname = params$dhis2Hostname,
      port = params$dhis2Port, path = params$dhis2Path),
    dataset_options = get_dataset_options(
      reportingPeriodFrom = params$reportingPeriodFrom,
      reportingPeriodTo = params$reportingPeriodTo,
      birthWeightFrom = params$birthWeightFrom,
      birthWeightTo = params$birthWeightTo,
      gestationWeeksFrom = params$gestationWeeksFrom,
      gestationWeeksTo = params$gestationWeeksTo,
      reportingCountries = params$reportingCountries,
      testUnitFilter = params$testUnitFilter,
      defaultPatientFilter = params$defaultPatientFilter,
      validationExceptionFile = params$validationExceptionFile))) |>
    neoipcr::calculate_reference_data()
}

```

```{r Preparing localised data}
#| include: false

ref_counts <- list(
  n_departments = reference_data$n_departments,
  n_patients = reference_data$n_patients$total,
  n_enrollments = reference_data$n_enrollments$total,
  n_patient_days = reference_data$n_patient_days$total,
  n_severe_infections = reference_data$incidence_density_rate_table |>
    dplyr::filter(inf == "si") |> dplyr::pull("n"),
  n_infectious_agents = reference_data$infectious_agent_detection_rate_per_agent_table |>
    dplyr::filter(group == "Total") |> dplyr::pull("n"),
  n_infections_with_agent = reference_data$infectious_agent_detection_rate_per_inf_type_table |>
    dplyr::filter(inf == "all") |> dplyr::pull("n"),
  n_infections_overall = reference_data$n_infections |>
    dplyr::filter(inf_type == "overall") |> dplyr::pull("total"),
  n_surgical_departments = reference_data$n_surgical_departments,
  n_surgical_patients = reference_data$n_surgical_patients |> dplyr::pull("total"),
  n_surgical_procedures = reference_data$n_surgical_procedures |> dplyr::pull("total"),
  n_surgical_site_infections = reference_data$n_infections |>
    dplyr::filter(inf_type == "ssi") |> dplyr::pull("total")
)

dR <- c(
  list(creationTimestamp = format(
    lubridate::now("UTC"), format = "%x %X", tz = "UTC", usetz = TRUE)),
  format_dataset_resources(reference_data$metadata, ref_counts, sR)
)

# Detect if reference dataset has mixed World Bank classes
mixed_wb_classes <- detect_mixed_wb_classes(
  ref_countries = reference_data$metadata$countries,
  include_wb_class = reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$include_world_bank_class
)

```

```{r Set up NeoIPC layout}
#| include: false

NeoIPC_pallette <- c("#FF9015","#0083C1","#0D4F6C","#E6FAFC","#E0D3DE","#1F271B")
pal <- c(NeoIPC_pallette[5],NeoIPC_pallette[2],NeoIPC_pallette[6])

```
